name: Wave Capital
notes: Seed fund founded by Airbnb alumni (David Rosenthal, Sara Adler, Riley Newman). Marketplace-focused fund based in SF.

name: Spider Capital
source: spidercapital.com official site + pitchbook (785 Market St, Suite 700, SF, CA 94103)
notes: Seed-stage enterprise cloud VC. Founded by Michael Neril in 2015.

name: Behind Genius Ventures
notes: Founded 2021 by Joshua Schlisserman and Paige Doherty. Some sources say LA, but majority (Crunchbase, Tracxn) indicate San Diego.

name: Stellation Capital
source: pitchbook (55 Water Street, Floor 3, Brooklyn, NY 11201) + bloomberg
notes: Solo GP fund led by Peter Boyce II. Founded 2021. Focuses on philomath founding teams.

name: Wischoff Ventures
notes: Solo GP Nichole Wischoff. Pre-seed/seed fund. NYC-based; one source mentioned SF but majority confirm New York.

name: Julian Capital
notes: Deeptech seed fund. Primary location SF; one source mentioned Half Moon Bay.

name: Virtue
notes: Healthcare-focused VC (HealthTech). Founded 2021 by Sean Doolan and Emre Karatas. Invests in digital health pre-seed/seed.

name: Walkabout Ventures
notes: Seed-focused VC. One source (PEI) listed Phoenix but majority confirm Los Angeles.

name: System.One
source: crunchbase + tracxn + systemone.vc (Rosenthaler Straße 23, 10119 Berlin, Germany)
notes: Pre-seed VC based in Berlin, Germany. Solo GP Max Claussen. Founded 2016. Global mindset.

name: Chapter One
notes: Founded 2017 by Jeff Morris Jr. Early-stage VC, pre-seed through Series B. Crunchbase lists Santa Monica (within LA metro).

name: Alt Capital
notes: Founded 2023 by Jack Altman (ex-Lattice). Early-stage generalist fund. $1-10M check sizes, seed through Series A.

name: Comma Capital
notes: Founded 2019. Primary HQ New York City; also has SF presence.
